testcase.name: runScenario["Create a new walk-in booking for an existing guest with cash payment", "Create Booking"](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for at least one condition to be valid: url to contain "booking/details". Current url: "https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/book-room?book-type=Walk%20In" || url to contain "booking/". Current url: "https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/book-room?book-type=Walk%20In" || visibility of element located by By.cssSelector: #postPayment (tried for 60 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '14.6', java.version: '17.0.13' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: /var/folders/bt/fnhvdc_n35x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49689}, goog:processID: 3758, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49689/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 026f50ed22b7d3470cc2986717242a34

URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [CommonSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Given I am logged in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.iAmLoggedIn() When I navigate to bookings page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iNavigateToBookingsPage() [BookingSteps] dumpRoomPageState: currentUrl=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/book-room?book-type=Walk%20In [BookingSteps] dumpRoomPageState: title=Hotel Xplore - Book Room [BookingSteps] dumpRoomPageState: totalButtons=25 [BookingSteps] button[0]='' class='js-toggle-fullscreen-btn toggle-fullscreen-btn btn d-none d-md-block' [BookingSteps] button[1]='' class='btn-close border border-dark rounded' [BookingSteps] button[2]='' class='accordion-button' [BookingSteps] button[3]='' class='accordion-button collapsed' [BookingSteps] button[4]='' class='accordion-button collapsed' [BookingSteps] button[5]='Search' class='btn btn-warning w-100 h-45 search' [BookingSteps] button[6]='' class='btn btn-warning w-100 h-45 search-room-type d-none' [BookingSteps] button[7]='' class='float-end btn btn-dark' [BookingSteps] button[8]='' class='btn btn-warning h-45 w-100 btn-book payment-btn company-payment-btn' [BookingSteps] button[9]='' class='btn btn-warning h-45 w-100 btn-book btn-confirm d-none company-book-btn' [BookingSteps] button[10]='' class='close border border-dark rounded' [BookingSteps] button[11]='' class='btn btn-dark btn-lg' [BookingSteps] button[12]='' class='btn btn-primary btn-lg btn-book btn-confirm' [BookingSteps] button[13]='' class='close border border-dark rounded' [BookingSteps] button[14]='' class='btn btn-primary float-end' [BookingSteps] cash label count=0 [BookingSteps] room container count=4 [BookingSteps] User's specific XPath failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: (//div[@class='modal-dialog modal-dialog-scrollable modal-xl modal-dialog-centered']//button[@class="btn btn-outline-dark room_types"])[1] (tried for 40 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.15.0', Apr 17, 2026 2:52:46 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 17, 2026 2:52:46 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.56. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
